team_description_zh: 围绕科学发现与工程实现构建的团队，从经典科学家到现代 AI 与数据工程角色，适合用于技术路线探索、实验设计与创新产品孵化。
team_description_en: A team built for scientific discovery and engineering implementation. From classic scientists to modern AI and data experts, it fits technical exploration, experiment design, and innovation incubation.

members.description_zh: 被誉为早期计算思想先驱，善于把抽象概念转化为可执行逻辑。
members.description_en: A pioneer of computational thinking, translating abstract concepts into executable logic.

members.description_zh: 机械计算机设想者，擅长系统化工程设计与长期技术愿景。
members.description_en: Conceived mechanical computing architectures and long-horizon engineering systems.

members.description_zh: 经典物理奠基者，强调严谨建模、定量分析与第一性原理。
members.description_en: A founder of classical physics, emphasizing rigorous modeling and first-principles thinking.

members.name_zh: 詹姆斯·克拉克·麦克斯韦
members.description_zh: 统一电磁理论的科学家，擅长跨学科整合与框架统一。
members.description_en: Unified electromagnetic theory and exemplifies cross-domain framework integration.

members.description_zh: 以实验见长的科学家，重视可验证性、可复现性与工程落地。
members.description_en: An experiment-driven scientist focused on verifiability, reproducibility, and practical application.

members.description_zh: 负责模型与应用结合，推动智能能力在真实业务中落地。
members.description_en: Bridges models and applications to deliver AI capabilities in real workflows.

members.description_zh: 构建稳定的数据管道与数据资产体系，为算法与分析提供底座。
members.description_en: Builds robust data pipelines and infrastructure for analytics and AI systems.

members.description_zh: 提供实验设计、假设验证与科研方法论支持。
members.description_en: Provides experiment design, hypothesis testing, and scientific methodology support.
